sentence: Last updated: 18th of October, 2024

PURE Marketing Innovations Ltd ("we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and disclose information when you use our mobile app, Tallaween (the "App"), and your rights in relation to that information.
By downloading, installing, and using the App, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with this policy, please do not use the App.

We are committed to minimizing the amount of information we collect. To ensure the App functions properly, we collect the following: Game Access Information: To allow you to access and participate in the game, we collect information such as your chosen username and game progress data.

We are committed to minimizing the amount of information we collect. To ensure the App functions properly, we collect the following: Device Information: We may automatically collect certain information about your device, such as the operating system, device type, and app version, for technical support and troubleshooting.

section: H2:2. How We Use the Information
sentence: We use the collected information solely for the following purposes

section: H2:2. How We Use the Information
sentence: Game Access: To allow you to play and interact with the App, including game mechanics

section: H2:3. What We Do Not Collect
sentence: We do not collect any personal information beyond what is necessary for accessing the game.

section: H2:3. What We Do Not Collect
sentence: Specifically: We do not collect personal information such as your name, email address, or contact information for marketing or re-sale purposes

section: H2:3. What We Do Not Collect
sentence: Specifically: We do not track your location or collect any sensitive personal data.

section: H2:3. What We Do Not Collect
sentence: Specifically: We do not use your data for advertising or marketing purposes.
We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your information to outside parties. The only exception is for technical support services or if required by law.

The App is not directed at children under the age of 13, and we do not knowingly collect any personal information from children under 13. If we discover that a child under 13 has provided us with their personal information, we will promptly delete it.

We take reasonable precautions to protect the information we collect from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. However, no method of electronic storage or transmission is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
You have the right to: Access: Request access to the data we have collected about you
You have the right to: Delete: Request the deletion of any data we may hold about you.
You have the right to: Process for account deletion:
You have the right to: Method 1:
You have the right to: https://halloween.arenhanced.com/account_deletion_process
You have the right to: Method 2:
You have the right to: tallaween24@gmail.com
For any queries regarding your data or to make any of the above requests, please contact us at tallaween24@gmail.com.

section: H2:8. Changes to this Privacy Policy
sentence: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will notify you by updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Please review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
Email: tallaween24@gmail.com
